ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the stock information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the price data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total dollar amount traded */,
  "turnover_rate" REAL /* Turnover rate of the stock */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* After-hours price of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, advisor, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stocks" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user following the stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being followed */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the user started following the stock */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User's notes about the stock */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alerts (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the follow entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stocks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume, percentage change) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value to trigger the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, canceled) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "notification_preference" TEXT /* User's preference for notifications (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
